items.title: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.

items.title: Keaton Wagler got hit in the face and Nick Martinelli started to walk over towards the Utah bench as if he was going to fight on Wagler’s behalf. The play is under review for a possible flagrant foul. Clippers lead 65-54.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler got hit in the face and Nick Martinelli started to walk over towards the Utah bench as if he was going to fight on Wagler’s behalf. The play is under review for a possible flagrant foul. Clippers lead 65-54.

items.title: There’s a place in this league for guys who seem to understand their role and know exactly what it is they do well and, even more importantly, what they do not do well. Nick Martinelli probably falls in that group. Might be something there for the four-year Wildcat.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: There’s a place in this league for guys who seem to understand their role and know exactly what it is they do well and, even more importantly, what they do not do well. Nick Martinelli probably falls in that group. Might be something there for the four-year Wildcat.

items.title: Nick Martinelli, and I've said this before, hoops like he expects to score 20 when he's out there
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Nick Martinelli, and I've said this before, hoops like he expects to score 20 when he's out there

He's outscoring the Jazz bench by himself 9-7

Clippers lead 23-16 with 7:56 left in first half

items.title: That was a first quarter with two Nick Martinelli dunks. Gotta ask him the last time that happened.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
That was a first quarter with two Nick Martinelli dunks. Gotta ask him the last time that happened.

Clippers lead Jazz 19-13

Norchad Omier: 3 points, 4 rebounds, 1 steal

Clippers outscoring Jazz 8-2 off turnovers

items.title: Clippers lead Jazz 19-13 after one. Baba Miller paces the team with 5 points, while Nick Martinelli has 4. Keaton Wagler has 3 points and 2 assists in 8 minutes. Clippers shot 38%. Darryn Peterson has 4 points for Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers lead Jazz 19-13 after one. Baba Miller paces the team with 5 points, while Nick Martinelli has 4. Keaton Wagler has 3 points and 2 assists in 8 minutes. Clippers shot 38%. Darryn Peterson has 4 points for Utah.

items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

items.title: Clippers lead Kings 22-20 after one. Cam Christie leads all scorers with 9 points and has 4 rebounds. Kobe Sanders with 2 points, Nick Martinelli has 6. Keaton Wagler hasn’t scored so far in 6 minutes but does have a rebound and an assist.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers lead Kings 22-20 after one. Cam Christie leads all scorers with 9 points and has 4 rebounds. Kobe Sanders with 2 points, Nick Martinelli has 6. Keaton Wagler hasn’t scored so far in 6 minutes but does have a rebound and an assist.

items.title: Nick Martinelli on Keaton Wagler, his new teammate on the LA Clippers: “He’s a great kid. He’s young. He’s still trying to figure it out. He’s a star, he has so much talent, he’s so gifted. … I have a ton of confidence in him.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Nick Martinelli on Keaton Wagler, his new teammate on the LA Clippers: “He’s a great kid. He’s young. He’s still trying to figure it out. He’s a star, he has so much talent, he’s so gifted. … I have a ton of confidence in him.”

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers have signed Nick Martinelli to a two-way contract, league sources told HoopsHype. Martinelli was the 55th pick of the 2026 NBA Draft and a two-time All-Big Ten selection. Agent Austin Walton of NEXT Sports worked with the Clippers on the deal.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers have signed Nick Martinelli to a two-way contract, league sources told HoopsHype. Martinelli was the 55th pick of the 2026 NBA Draft and a two-time All-Big Ten selection. Agent Austin Walton of NEXT Sports worked with the Clippers on the deal.

items.title: The LA Clippers have released their 2026 Las Vegas Summer League roster. It will feature Keaton Wagler, Kobe Sanders, Baba Miller, Cam Christie, Nick Martinelli, and Sean Medulla, among others.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: The LA Clippers have released their 2026 Las Vegas Summer League roster. It will feature Keaton Wagler, Kobe Sanders, Baba Miller, Cam Christie, Nick Martinelli, and Sean Medulla, among others.

items.title: LA Clippers have officially announced that they’ve acquired the draft rights to Nick Martinelli, the 55th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, from the New York Knicks in exchange for cash considerations.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: LA Clippers have officially announced that they’ve acquired the draft rights to Nick Martinelli, the 55th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, from the New York Knicks in exchange for cash considerations.

Nick Martinelli transaction is incomplete so... apologies for the premature question on that one 😐

I did want to ask Trent Redden about whatever trade chatter existed at 5

"We got a lot of calls... It was pretty clear to us that we were confident that we were going to be taking Keaton"

items.title: With the 55th pick of the NBA Draft the New York Knicks select Nick Martinelli!
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
With the 55th pick of the NBA Draft the New York Knicks select Nick Martinelli!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: So the Clippers bought 55 to take Martinelli
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
So the Clippers bought 55 to take Martinelli

They moved down to 57 to take Narcisse N'Goy 

I don't know if you'll ever see N'Goy but hey even David Micheneau made it to summer league...

items.title: Martinelli shot 41.7% on 3-pointers last season, but is viewed as more of a mid-range and crafty scorer. The lefty shot 64% around the rim last season, as well. Martinelli, 22, spent four years at Northwestern.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Martinelli shot 41.7% on 3-pointers last season, but is viewed as more of a mid-range and crafty scorer. The lefty shot 64% around the rim last season, as well. Martinelli, 22, spent four years at Northwestern.
